raw_consumer_statement:
CFPB Complaint : Citibank Subject/Issue Type : Billing dispute / Problem with an investigation Company : Citibank Description of what happened : I am filing a complaint regarding Citibanks failure to conduct a reasonable investigation into a billing dispute and their refusal to respond to my written correspondence. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I was charged {$73.00} by XXXX. I did not receive the groceries I ordered ; a delivery mix-up resulted in pet food being delivered to my home instead. After the merchant failed to resolve the issue, I filed a dispute with Citibank ( Case ID : XXXX for Account Ending : XXXX ). 

Citibank issued a conditional credit but then reversed it on XX/XX/XXXX, claiming " the merchant provided documentation that services/merchandise was completed. '' However, the documentation Citibank provided to me as the merchant 's " rebuttal '' was a completely blank letter containing no evidence, signatures, or delivery confirmation. 

On XX/XX/XXXX, I sent a formal written request via mail to Citibank 's Dispute Department in XXXX XXXX, SD, asking them to reopen the investigation. I provided photographic and video evidence showing the incorrect delivery, along with documentation of my attempts to resolve this with XXXX. Citibank has completely ignored this letter and has failed to respond or reopen the case.
